Who are we?
Skilled Virtual Guards Armed with Cutting-edge AI Technology
VDOintel is a premier provider of advanced surveillance solutions tailored to meet the
unique security needs of properties, shopping malls, warehouses, hospitals, restaurants,
meat packaging industries, etc. Our team of skilled professionals leverage state-of-the-art
technology to deliver real-time monitoring, ensuring the highest levels of security and
operational efficiency. We provide our clients with unparalleled peace of mind through
continuous surveillance and immediate response to any security threats.
Explore Us
Our Clients

Our Strengths
Our cutting-edge surveillance technology and proficient monitoring ensures comprehensive
security and rapid incident response. Our commitment to tailored solutions and client
satisfaction sets us apart as a premier service provider in the industry.
Technology
VDOintel remote video surveillance utilizes state-of-the-art technology, including high-
definition cameras, advanced analytics, and real-time alerts. Our innovative systems ensure
precise monitoring and quick response to any security threats.
Cost Effective
VDOintel real-time video monitoring services are cost-effective and reduce the need for on-
site personnel. Our efficient systems lower operational expenses while maintaining high
standards of safety and security.
24/7
We provide round-the-clock surveillance to ensure continuous protection of people & their
properties. Our experts use advanced technology to monitor and respond to security events
promptly, maintaining a secure environment 24*7*365.
Remote Access
Our remote access surveillance feature enables clients to monitor their properties in real
time from anywhere. This capability provides convenience and peace of mind, allowing for
immediate response to incidents and proactive security management.
Our Security Blanket

Our services cover all critical areas, including entrances, exits, parking lots, and common spaces, helping to deter theft, manage crowd control, and quickly respond to emergencies.

Protecting Your Properties, Securing Your Peace of Mind – Introducing VDOIntel Advanced Surveillance Systems.
Get a Demo
Multi-family residential security surveillance
Multi-family residential security surveillance has evolved significantly with the introduction of live video monitoring technology. This innovative system allows property owners and managers to keep a watchful eye on their buildings in real time, no matter where they may be. Crimes have increased rapidly post pandemic. So, our security solutions are much evolved to help reduce crime rate.
Our multi-family residential live video surveillance comes with speaker announcement feature as playing audio warnings etc. It helps detect suspicious activities or safety hazards early and so can be addressed promptly, ensuring the safety and security of all residents. Majorly the tool helps larger properties or complexes that require constant monitoring but may not have the resources for on-site staff at all hours of the day. By leveraging VDOIntel's advanced video surveillance technology, property managers can enhance their ability to prevent incidents such as break-ins, vandalism, or disruptive behaviour within their communities.
An Added Layer of Protection & Accountability within Shared Living Spaces
A state-of-the-art technology that allows property managers and owners to always keep a watchful eye on their buildings.
Enables instant access to footage from any connected device, giving users the ability to respond quickly to any potential threats or emergencies.
Provides continuous oversight of common areas, parking lots, and entry points, helping to deter criminal activity before it occurs.
With VDOIntel's multi-family residential real-time video monitoring system, residents can feel secure knowing that their homes are under constant watch and protection.
Converting View to Vision: Every Site, Shift & Second

Remote Video Surveillance for Commercial
Monitor & Secure your Business from Anywhere with VDOIntel's Commercial Property Security Solutions.
Get a Demo
Commercial Property Security Solutions
Commercial property security is a top priority for businesses looking to protect their assets and ensure the safety of employees and customers. With advancements in technology, commercial spaces can now benefit from office building live security surveillance monitoring systems. The systems allow for real-time monitoring of activity within and around the premises, providing an additional layer of protection against potential threats such as theft, vandalism, or trespassing.
Commercials such as shopping malls can also greatly benefit from shopping center remote video surveillance that helps keep a watchful eye on large areas with multiple retail stores and parking lots. This advanced form of security allows business owners to have peace of mind knowing that their property is being monitored 24/7 by trained professionals who can promptly respond to any suspicious activity detected on the premises. Overall, investing in VDOIntel's remote video surveillance for commercial is a cost-effective solution for enhancing security measures and deterring criminal behaviour effectively.
Experience State-of-the-art Commercial Property Security from VDOIntel
Office building live security surveillance allows business owners to monitor their property in real time, providing them with peace of mind knowing that experts are always keeping a watchful eye on their premises.
Shopping center remote video surveillance enables managers to quickly respond to any suspicious activities or incidents that may occur on the property.
For crimes such as "smash and grab" thefts, we offer real-time monitoring and instant alerts. Our surveillance systems enable swift intervention by security personnel or law enforcement, minimizing losses and damage.
Integrated with advanced sensors, remote video surveillance can detect smoke and fire early, enabling quick response to prevent extensive damage and ensure safety.
Remote video surveillance for commercial helps deter vandalism, including graffiti, by providing clear evidence for identification and prosecution, helping maintain property aesthetics and reducing cleanup costs.
Advanced video analytics detects unusual crowd formations and aggressive behaviours, enabling swift action to de-escalate situations and maintain order.
Live Surveillance Monitoring Systems for Enhanced Asset Safety
Protect your assets and ensure the safety of your employees and customers with VDOIntel's cutting-edge office building live security surveillance monitoring solutions. Keep an eye on your commercial space in real time for added peace of mind.

The systems utilize advanced technology to capture high-definition video footage of key areas within a warehouse, allowing for real-time monitoring and playback capabilities. By implementing VDOIntel logistics remote video surveillance systems, businesses can deter theft and vandalism, as well as improve overall operational efficiency by detecting any potential issues or incidents that may arise.
Furthermore, video surveillance offers the convenience of being able to monitor multiple warehouses or distribution centers from a centralized location, providing managers with valuable insights into their overall supply chain operations. With logistics remote monitoring capabilities integrated into these systems, businesses can stay ahead of potential risks and always maintain a secure and organized warehouse environment.
Ensure Seamless Operations While Safeguarding Assets Effectively with VDOIntel
Warehouse video surveillance systems provide round-the-clock monitoring of the facility, ensuring that any suspicious activities or security breaches are promptly detected & addressed.
Help reduce liability risks for businesses. In the event of accidents or incidents involving employees or visitors on-site, recorded footage from these systems can serve as valuable evidence for insurance claims disputes or legal proceedings.
Logistics remote monitoring prevents potential criminals from targeting the facility. Due to increased security measures, companies may also enjoy lower insurance premiums over time.

Video Surveillance in Schools
Enhance your Campus Safety Measures with VDOIntel Proactive Surveillance.
Get a Demo
The use of surveillance camera
The use of surveillance camera in schools has become increasingly common to enhance safety and security for students and staff. The video surveillance systems are strategically placed throughout school buildings, hallways, entrances, and other key areas to monitor activity and deter potential threats or incidents. Video surveillance in schools acts as a visual deterrent to misconduct such as vandalism, theft, bullying, or violence. In case of an emergency, these cameras provide valuable real-time information to authorities for quick response and intervention.
Additionally, video footage from surveillance cameras can be used for investigation into disciplinary issues or criminal activities that may occur on school grounds. While there are concerns about privacy implications and ethical considerations surrounding the use of surveillance technology in educational settings, many argue that the benefits outweigh the drawbacks when it comes to maintaining a safe learning environment for all individuals within the school community.
Protecting Schools with VDOIntel: The Leading Surveillance Solution for Peace of Mind
The surveillance camera in schools acts as a powerful deterrent against potential acts of violence or vandalism on school grounds. The presence of CCTV cameras can discourage misbehaviour from both students and outsiders, helping to maintain order and discipline within the campus.
Helps capture valuable evidence in case of any incidents or emergencies that may occur within the school premises. By capturing footage of incidents, these cameras can assist authorities in understanding what transpired and taking appropriate action accordingly.
Video surveillance in schools helps monitor student behaviour and ensures adherence to school policies and regulations. Administrators can review camera footage to address any issues promptly and effectively before they escalate further.
IStrategic placement of cameras helps enhance overall safety by monitoring entry points and common areas for signs of unauthorized individuals or suspicious activities. This proactive approach allows for prompt intervention & prevents potential threats or dangers from materializing on campus.
VDOIntel's enhanced safety and threat detection helps identify and respond to external threats (as the presence of weapons). Advanced surveillance systems equipped with video analytics can detect suspicious objects or behaviours, such as someone carrying arms, and immediately alert school security personnel and local authorities.

Keep Your Operations Running Smoothly with VDOIntel Manufacturing Video Surveillance.
Get a Demo
Security of a manufacturing facility
When it comes to ensuring the safety and security of a manufacturing facility, having VDOIntel’s robust security solutions in place is crucial. One key feature of our solutions is manufacturing video surveillance systems that provide real-time monitoring and recording of activities within the facility. With advanced technology such as high-definition cameras and motion detection software, the surveillance systems offer round-the-clock protection against threats like theft, vandalism, or unauthorized access.
By implementing our solutions as entry protocol adherence and alarm systems, manufacturers can create a comprehensive security solution that helps prevent incidents before they occur. We also work on improving operational efficiencies by measuring machine uptime & downtime, thereby reducing human errors along with security aspects. In addition to enhancing the physical security of the facility; our manufacturing security solutions also play a critical role in maintaining compliance with industry regulations and standards. By partnering with VDOIntel, manufacturers can protect their assets while ensuring the safety of their employees.
Protect your Manufacturing Facility with Top-of-the-line Manufacturing Video Surveillance from VDOIntel.
VDOIntel manufacturing video surveillance enhances employee productivity and efficiency by providing continuous oversight and real-time feedback. Our solutions ensure adherence to safety protocol and performance standards, contributing to a more effective and compliant workforce.
Our service includes optimising equipment efficiency by continuously monitoring operational uptime & runtime. Our advanced surveillance systems help identify maintenance needs and ensure optimal performance, reducing downtime and increasing productivity.
VDOIntel services also help staff leverage data and analytics to calculate performance metrics like cycle time & quality control. Our comprehensive surveillance data provides actionable insights, enhancing operational efficiency and decision-making.

July 9th, 2025
The Evolving Impact of AI on Remote Video Monitoring: 2023 to 2026
Are you monitoring your properties or overall security and watching quietly?
Of course, they record everything for sure, but when something goes wrong, you review footage later, but sometimes it’s of no use.
What if your security video monitoring system could predict before you notice something is wrong?
AI remote video monitoring system
(RVM) made it possible.
You can get a real-time, intelligent, and highly capable security system that can alert you to threats before they happen.
In this blog post, we are going to discuss how AI is impacting remote video monitoring and the evolving impact of AI on RVM.
What is an AI Remote Video Monitoring System (RVM)?
Remote video monitoring
is an effective security strategy to protect various assets and ensure proper security. Security personnel can monitor from different locations at a time with a centralized control room. The RVM systems are capable of capturing clear footage without missing a detail.
Smarter surveillance: Why traditional CCTV isn’t enough anymore.
RVM systems that are powered by AI technology have transformed physical security with proactive intelligence. With the usage of advanced analytics and machine learning technologies, AI systems are accurately predicting vulnerabilities and potential threats.
This shift has enabled the security to address the issues before they escalate. This ensures better protection and safety with a proactive approach. The ability of AI to quickly analyze large data sets helps in the identification of trends and anomalies that we might miss during traditional surveillance.
Benefits of AI-based remote surveillance over physical security
AI surveillance systems
are far more capable compared to physical surveillance systems. Here are the benefits that help you understand its capabilities.
Affordable
When you look into the long-term benefits and higher value potential, AI is affordable. There may be upfront costs, but the long-term benefits outweigh everything. AI remote monitoring systems can reduce the overall dependency on physical surveillance and other labor operational costs. It helps in the prevention of theft, vandalism, and operational disruptions.
Highly accurate and Fast
AI has the super ability to analyze large volumes of data with utmost speed and accuracy that humans can’t match. Compared to the traditional systems that depend mainly on manual monitoring of screens, this may lead to missed cues and distractions. But
AI works 24/7 with real-time
detailing and flags suspicious behavior instantly. It cuts down the false alarms and helps security teams to stay focused on what matters.
According to the global AI surveillance market, it is forecasted that the AI surveillance market will reach over $21 billion and become the most trusted in the surveillance industry.
Instant Alert System, Quick Responses
Time is always critical when dealing with security threats, but AI will not miss a point. They are designed to identify and quickly respond to the risks in real time. Be it spotting an unknown bag or object in crowded places or the detection of breaches at access points, it immediately alerts the security to take action. Thus, it helps in reducing the incident response time.
In a 2023 report from a reputable organization, it is revealed that the
AI-powered surveillance systems
reduced their incident response times by 60%, making them sit in a safer and more secure environment.
No Privacy Issues
Many organizations or individuals may think that AI hurts privacy wherever it is integrated. But it is not true. It improves the overall privacy as it shields the sensitive data from human exposure. AI can blur out the faces and license plates or personal identities unless it identifies a real threat. It maintains safety and individual privacy, too.
According to IBM’s 2023 report, AI-driven encryption helped them reduce data breaches by 30% globally.
AI enables proactive security instead of reactive responses
AI remote monitoring systems analyze the patterns in real time and help in comparing the historical data. It helps in forecasting the risks before they escalate. Deloitte has noted that an AI surveillance system helps them reduce the unexpected downtime by 40%
Enhanced Safety in Industries
Many industries are exposed to high-risk conditions; the AI surveillance systems ensure better safety. They can monitor the dangerous zones and detect unsafe behaviors. It helps in alerting the staff and preventing accidents. AI-powered monitoring systems are highly valuable in industries like mining, construction, and oil and gas.
The National Safety Council reveals that workplaces that are powered by AI have reported a 30% decrease in workplace accidents
Edge AI vs. Cloud AI in surveillance: What works best for remote monitoring?
Edge AI is generally referred to as AI-powered processing that is on-site, and it is directly connected to the camera or other devices like a network video recorder. It doesn’t depend on sending data to the cloud, as the analysis will happen locally.
Cloud AI
in surveillance mainly depends on the remote servers for processing video footage from the cameras. It offers large-scale data storage and centralized monitoring with deep learning capabilities. It perfectly fits into complex and distributed setups.
Edge AI vs. Cloud AI—Which Is Best for Remote Monitoring?

From motion detection to behavior recognition: What modern AI surveillance can do.
Top 5 misconceptions about AI in video monitoring
1. AI Surveillance Systems replace Human Security Jobs completely: AI supports and enhances the overall human monitoring by decreasing error and fatigue. Human judgment is still crucial in complex situations and final decision-making.
2. AI surveillance is about watching and recording everything. No, most AI systems are programmed to detect specific patterns; they don’t monitor everything unless triggered.
3. Violates privacy: Misleading, AI enhances privacy by covering confidential information. It minimizes unnecessary human viewing unless there is a threat.
4. Detects all threats from day one: Not really; AI systems improve over time through learning and training with data. The initial steps refine and sometimes lead to false positives or miss rare anomalies.
5. Too expensive: the costs have already dropped significantly compared to the last 3 years. Small businesses can deploy at an affordable price, tailored to their needs.
What is the perception of businesses on the usage of artificial intelligence in surveillance?
Businesses are increasingly trusting the AI-powered surveillance rather than checking it as a simple security tool. More than 62% of enterprises reportedly integrated AI into their security infrastructure and improved operational efficiency and risk assessment. According to a PwC report, more than 70% of business leaders noticed AI surveillance systems playing a key role in smarter decision-making. So, it is clear that the perception of businesses towards AI surveillance systems is changing positively and will increase rapidly.
FAQ’s
1. What is AI Remote Video Monitoring (AI-RVM)?
AI Remote Video Monitoring (AI-RVM) is an intelligent surveillance system that uses artificial intelligence to analyze video feeds in real time, detect threats, and provide instant alerts—reducing the need for constant human oversight.
2. Can AI surveillance systems work without an internet connection?
Yes, Edge AI systems can function locally without relying on the internet. These are ideal for remote areas where connectivity is limited and real-time response is critical.
3. What’s the difference between Edge AI and Cloud AI in surveillance?
Edge AI processes data locally at the camera or device level for faster response and better privacy. Cloud AI sends data to remote servers for analysis and is ideal for large-scale, centralized monitoring.
4. What industries benefit the most from AI surveillance?
Industries like construction, oil and gas, mining, retail, logistics, and smart cities benefit greatly due to their high-risk environments and the need for real-time, scalable security solutions.
5. Can AI detect unusual or suspicious behavior?
Yes, AI uses pattern recognition and behavioral analytics to identify anomalies—such as loitering, perimeter breaches, or unattended objects—and alerts security teams immediately.

Standing with Los Angeles During the Devastating Wildfires of 2025
The
Los Angeles wildfires
that tore through the city in January 2025 have left a deep scar on the area and its people. The Palisades and
Eaton Fires
swept through neighborhoods, destroying homes, businesses, and cherished spots that locals held close to their hearts. It’s hard to find the right words when something so heartbreaking happens, but one thing is clear: our hearts are with everyone affected by these devastating
Los Angeles wildfires
.
It’s difficult to watch as entire communities are devastated, knowing that families have lost everything they’ve worked so hard for. Places that once brought comfort, like the Reel Inn, are now gone. The loss is more than just physical—it’s the memories, the sense of home, the small things that made life feel stable and secure.
Yet, in the midst of this loss, we’ve seen incredible strength and resilience. Neighbors have stepped in to help each other, strangers have shown up with open arms, and first responders are giving their all to save what they can. It’s a reminder of the power of community—how, even in the darkest times, people come together to lift each other up.
We know that recovery from the
Los Angeles wildfires
will be a long road. Rebuilding homes, businesses, and lives doesn’t happen overnight. But what’s clear is that Los Angeles won’t face this alone. The city has proven time and time again that, no matter how hard things get, it always rises again.
To everyone impacted by the
Los Angeles wildfires
—our thoughts are with you. We stand beside you, ready to support however we can, and we know that together, you will rebuild stronger than ever.
VDOintel
will continue to provide updates and assistance in any way possible.

5 Ways Security Camera Monitoring Services Can Help Hotels & Resorts
In the hospitality landscape, ensuring the safety and security of guests and property is vital for hotels and resorts. With cutting-edge technologies,
security camera monitoring services
have emerged as invaluable tools to mitigate risks, deter criminal activities, and enhance the overall guest experience. In this comprehensive article today: – let’s delve into the – 5 key ways live remote video monitoring services can bolster security and operational efficiency within hotels and resorts.
Real-Time Surveillance and Incident Response
Live video camera monitoring service provides robust and comprehensive monitoring, enabling continuous surveillance of critical areas such as lobbies, parking lots, corridors, recreational facilities, etc. Trained professionals actively monitor video feeds, swiftly identifying suspicious activities or potential security breaches. With real-time alerts and notifications, security personnel can respond promptly to incidents, minimizing disruptions and ensuring the safety of guests and staff.
Crime Deterrence and Loss Prevention
Live remote video monitoring also acts as a powerful deterrent against criminal activities such as theft, vandalism, and trespassing. Hotels and resorts often house valuable assets, including guest belongings, electronic equipment, and artworks. By deploying video camera monitoring services; management can effectively deter opportunistic criminals while safeguarding assets and minimizing losses. Additionally, recorded video footage serves as valuable evidence in the event of any security incidents or disputes.
Guest Safety and Risk Mitigation
Ensuring the safety and well-being of guests is a top priority for hospitality establishments. Security camera monitoring services play a crucial role in identifying
potential safety hazards
such as slip-and-fall accidents, unauthorized access to restricted areas, or medical emergencies. By maintaining a vigilant watch over public spaces and high-traffic areas, security personnel can quickly intervene, assist & also act when needed, mitigating risks, and enhancing guest satisfaction.
Operational Efficiency and Compliance
Beyond security, video camera monitoring services contribute to operational efficiency and regulatory compliance within hotels and resorts. By monitoring crucial areas such as kitchens, storage facilities and back-of-house operations; management can ensure adherence to hygiene standards, food safety protocols, and employee conduct policies. Furthermore, video surveillance helps detect operational inefficiencies, streamline workflow processes, and identify areas for improvement, ultimately enhancing the overall guest experience.
24/7 Protection and Peace of Mind
Hotels and resorts operate around the clock, catering to guests from various time zones and accommodating diverse needs.
Security camera monitoring services
provide uninterrupted surveillance and protection, regardless of the time of day or night. Whether it’s monitoring guest arrivals, securing premises during off-peak hours, or responding to emergencies, live remote video monitoring offers peace of mind to guests, staff, and management alike.
In conclusion, VDOintel’s video camera monitoring services offer multifaceted benefits to hotels and resorts, ranging from enhanced security and crime deterrence to operational efficiency and guest safety. By leveraging VDOintel live remote video monitoring, hospitality establishments can proactively identify and address security threats, mitigate risks, and uphold the highest standards of safety and service excellence. As technology evolves, integrating security camera monitoring services into the overall security strategy is essential for hotels and resorts to adapt to changing threats and safeguard their reputation and assets effectively.
